rationale: Educ. Code §29.096 governs a dropout reduction pilot program with capped grant funding. It contains no reference to homestead exemptions, Tax Code §11.13, or property tax appraised values, so the proposed change creates no conflict.
quote: Using funds appropriated for that purpose in an amount not to exceed $4 million each year, the commissioner shall establish a pilot program under which a school district or open-enrollment charter school may receive a grant to implement a local collaborative dropout reduction program.
_note: No direct or indirect textual link between this statute and Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
